note: cargo build --release succeeds for x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu (native). Fails for x86_64-pc-windows-msvc, x86_64-apple-darwin, aarch64-apple-darwin because ring v0.16.20 (dep of boringtun) requires platform-native C compilers. Cross-compilation from Linux needs either platform-specific CI runners or cross toolchains (osxcross, xwin+clang-cl). This is an environment/CI setup issue, not a code issue.
